title: The Death of Chivalry

startPoint.en: Speak to Sir Owen at the Edgeville Monastery west of Edgeville.
startPoint.es: Habla con Sir Owen en el Edgeville Monastery, al oeste de Edgeville.

items.name: 5 free backpack space (for an armour set)
items.display: 5 free backpack space (for an armour set)

items.name: Bank
items.display: Combat equipment (not required from the start, able to retrieve from the bank when necessary)

kills: Dawn, and several groups of summoned skeletons

rewards.display: 3 quest points (if you have already done Black Knights' Fortress before its removal, you will not receive the quest points)
500 experience lamp (usable on one of the skills: Attack, Strength, Defence, Constitution, Ranged, Magic or Necromancy)

rewards.name: Titles
rewards.display: 4 Knightly titles (you are suggested one based on choices made during the quest, but you can pick any one at any time through the title interface) [Name] the Gallant [Name] the Pious [Name] the Brave [Name] the Valiant

rewards.name: Sir Owen Sonde's shield
rewards.display: Sir Owen Sonde's shield with an emote that may be performed while the shield is equipped

rewards.name: Skull of Remembrance
rewards.display: Skull of Remembrance that gives the ability to replay this quest's cinematic cutscenes (in a few locations only), teleport to the Black Knight ritual chamber, and to re-battle Dawn when used on her body

rewards.name: Dawn's key
rewards.display: Dawn's key, which opens Captain Dulcin's journal

rewards.name: The ability to loot the 8 dead Black Knights for more coins if you did not do so during the quest
rewards.display: The ability to loot the 8 dead Black Knights for more coins if you did not do so during the quest

rewards.name: The ability to loot Lieutenant Graves for more coins and dispose of his body if you did not do so during the quest
rewards.display: The ability to loot Lieutenant Graves for more coins and dispose of his body if you did not do so during the quest

postQuest.name: Black Knight captain's armour
postQuest.display: Ability to make Black Knight captain's armour a cosmetic override, "Dulcin", by defeating Dawn in battle after the quest. This can be done by using the Skull of Remembrance on Dawn's dead body.

postQuest.name: Water rune
postQuest.display: Searching the supply crate by Black Knights' tents next to the portal will yield 200 water runes and 100 fire runes if you did not take them during the quest.
Ability to replant the cabbages on the scorch marks in the Edgeville Monastery cabbage patch with 12 cabbage seeds and level 7 Farming, awarding 250 experience.

Players can find these rewards in the coffins in the Tomb of the Fallen, which can be returned to via the portal in the Black Knights' Fortress or by selecting teleport as an option on the Skull of Remembrance which is given to you in the quest. 3,500 experience lamp (usable on one of the skills: Attack, Strength, Defence, Constitution, Ranged, Magic, Necromancy, Prayer or Summoning), requires 40 Strength and 40 in the chosen combat skill, including Prayer). 60,000 experience lamp (requires 80 Strength and 65 Prayer). Gilded cabbage which summons Brassica Prime, who awards 10,000 bonus experience after being kicked 30 times (requires 60 Strength). This bonus Prayer experience is awarded in the form of double experience while you train in the skill, not instantaneously as given by XP lamps. Templar outfit, a cosmetic override.

postQuest.name: Skirmish
postQuest.display: Skirmish (if not unlocked already during Once Upon a Time in Gielinor: Fortunes)

text.en: Speak to Sir Owen in the garden north of the Edgeville Monastery.
text.es: Habla con Sir Owen en el jardín al norte del Edgeville Monastery.

chatOptions: 1 The who with the what now?
1 I guess I have one of those faces.
1 Saradomin must have had a good reason...

text.en: Talk to Saradomin after the cutscene.
text.es: Habla con Saradomin tras la escena.

text.en: Alternatively if aligned with another god.
text.es: Alternativamente, si estás alineado con otro dios.

text.en: Pick up the suit of armour just south-west of you and equip it.
text.es: Recoge el traje de armadura justo al suroeste y equípatelo.

text.en: Talk to Saradomin. There are multiple possibilities, choice-wise, to get through this. The list below is just a recommended choice order.
text.es: Habla con Saradomin. Hay varias posibilidades de elección para completar esto. La siguiente lista es solo un orden recomendado de opciones.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, teleport us to the Black Knights' Fortress.

text.en: Open the Portcullis.
text.es: Abre el Portcullis.

text.en: Fortress guard: (guaranteed suspicion on first chat option)
text.es: Guardia de la fortaleza: (sospecha garantizada en la primera opción de chat)

chatOptions: 1 No, I have something... special planned for him.

text.en: It is required to dismiss pets and familiars before proceeding.
text.es: Es necesario despedir a mascotas y familiares antes de continuar.

text.en: Head north, to Lieutenant York:
text.es: Dirígete al norte, hacia Lieutenant York:

chatOptions: 2 Are you suggesting I cannot handle a mere knight of Saradomin?

text.en: Head north-west, and climb up staircase. The fortress guard will stop you.
text.es: Dirígete al noroeste y sube las escaleras. El guardia de la fortaleza te detendrá.

chatOptions: 2 This prisoner is to be sacrificed.

text.en: Head to the to the south, talk to Hierophant Marius.
text.es: Dirígete al sur y habla con Hierophant Marius.

chatOptions: 3 I shall return after I deal with this Temple Knight.

text.en: Head south-east of the room, and climb up staircase. The fortress guard will stop you.
text.es: Dirígete al sureste de la sala y sube las escaleras. El guardia de la fortaleza te detendrá.

chatOptions: 2 I am bringing him to the tallest tower.
1 We need him to recover the weapon of power, as you know.

text.en: Go upstairs, head north to Lieutenant Graves.
text.es: Sube las escaleras, dirígete al norte hacia Lieutenant Graves.

chatOptions: 3 Stand aside. I will handle this.

text.en: Search the Lieutenant's body, and choose whether you want to kill him or not. It doesn't matter.
text.es: Registra el cuerpo del Lieutenant y decide si quieres matarlo o no. No importa cuál elijas.

text.en: Head up the stairs in the north-east to the ritual chamber.
text.es: Sube las escaleras del noreste hacia la cámara ritual.

text.en: Search the wardrobe for a Letter from Lord Daquarius.
text.es: Registra el armario en busca de una Letter from Lord Daquarius.

text.en: Search the box of candles for three red candles.
text.es: Registra la caja de velas en busca de tres velas rojas.

text.en: Search the shelf for chalk.
text.es: Registra la estantería en busca de tiza.

text.en: Pick up the Grimoire and read it.
text.es: Recoge el Grimoire y léelo.

text.en: Use a candle on each stand, and fix the symbol on the floor.
text.es: Usa una vela en cada soporte y ajusta el símbolo en el suelo.

text.en: Light the candles.
text.es: Enciende las velas.

text.en: Use chalk on Ritual circle. Note: The below incantations must be said in the order as they are written.
text.es: Usa la tiza en el círculo ritual. Nota: los siguientes cánticos deben decirse en el orden en que están escritos.

text.en: Chant over the north-west candle.
text.es: Canta sobre la vela del noroeste.

text.en: Chant over the north-east candle.
text.es: Canta sobre la vela del noreste.

text.en: Chant over the south-east candle.
text.es: Canta sobre la vela del sureste.

text.en: Enter the portal.
text.es: Entra en el portal.

text.en: You must remove the suit of armour that was equipped at the beginning of the quest.
text.es: Debes quitarte el traje de armadura que te equipaste al principio de la misión.

text.en: Defeat the three Black Knights.
text.es: Derrota a los tres Black Knights.

text.en: Search their bodies for Cage door key.
text.es: Registra sus cuerpos en busca de la Cage door key.

text.en: Unlock the hanging cage to the north, freeing the Damsel.
text.es: Abre la jaula colgante al norte, liberando a la Damsel.

text.en: Talk to Dawn and learn all she knows.
text.es: Habla con Dawn y averigua todo lo que sabe.

chatOptions: 3 How did the Kinshra capture you?

text.en: Search the supply crate south of the portal.
text.es: Registra la caja de suministros al sur del portal.

text.en: Enter the doorway to the east.
text.es: Entra por la puerta al este.

text.en: Inspect the coffins or the heaps of bones.
text.es: Inspecciona los ataúdes o los montones de huesos. ===Fern===

text.en: Head south, to the Wand of Resurrection.
text.es: Abre el Portcullis al sur.

text.en: Solve the puzzle by matching the tiles to lower the barrier.
text.es: Registra los cuerpos de los Black Knight.

text.en: The image of the completed puzzle is taken with the compass facing south.
text.es: Habla con Fern y derrótala.

text.en: Try to take the wand. A chat option appears. Select offer to risk your life.
text.es: Si se ha completado The Restless Ghost,

chatOptions: 2 I shall sacrifice my own blood.

text.en: Head north. Talk to Dawn.
text.es: Esquiva su habilidad de carga.

chatOptions: 3 Give me the wand or you won't live to regret it.

text.en: Defeat the Black Knights and Sir Owen.
text.es: Dirígete al sur, hacia la Wand of Resurrection.

text.en: Go north and open the portcullis.
text.es: Resuelve el puzle emparejando las baldosas para bajar la barrera.

text.en: Kill Dawn. Refer to the full guide if you're having trouble.
text.es: La imagen del puzle completado se toma con la brújula orientada hacia el sur.

text.en: Search Dawn's body.
text.es: Intenta coger la varita. Aparece una opción de chat. Elige ofrecer arriesgar tu vida.

text.en: Head south, enter the Portcullis and speak with Saradomin.
text.es: Dirígete al norte. Habla con Dawn.

chatOptions: 2 I will give you the wand.

text.en: When Saradomin asks if the player wants to be teleported back to Edgeville, it is recommended to stay in the tombs, to claim the extra post-quest rewards which require level 40 Strength and two other coffins requiring level 60 and 80 Strength.
text.es: Derrota a los Black Knights y a Sir Owen.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: Ve al norte y abre el Portcullis.
